lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਇਕੁ ਸ੍ਰੀਧਰ ਨਾਥੁ ਜਿ ਟੂਟੇ ਲੇਇ ਸਾਂਠਿ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak ik sreedhar naath ji ttootte lee saantth |15|
lines.english: O Nanak, the One Supreme Lord and Master of the earth reunites the separated ones. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈ ਕੋਊ ਐਸਾ ਮੀਤੁ ਜਿ ਤੋਰੈ ਬਿਖਮ ਗਾਂਠਿ ॥
lines.translit: hai koaoo aisaa meet ji torai bikham gaantth |
lines.english: Is there any such friend, who can untie this difficult knot?

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਵਉ ਦਸਾ ਅਨੇਕ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾਰਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: dhaavau dasaa anek prem prabh kaarane |
lines.english: I run around in all directions, searching for the love of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਖਣ ਬਾਣ ਚਲਾਇ ਨਾਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਧੵਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: teekhan baan chalaae naam prabh dhayaaeeai |
lines.english: Shoot them with the sharp arrows of meditation on the Name of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਸਤਾਵਹਿ ਦੂਤ ਕਵਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਮਾਰਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: panch sataaveh doot kavan bidh maarane |
lines.english: The five evil enemies are tormenting me; how can I destroy them?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਮਹਾਂ ਬਿਖਾਦੀ ਘਾਤ ਪੂਰਨ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: harihaan mahaan bikhaadee ghaat pooran gur paaeeai |16|
lines.english: O Lord! The way to slaughter these terrible sadistic enemies is obtained from the Perfect Guru. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀਨੀ ਦਾਤਿ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਨਿਖੁਟਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur keenee daat mool na nikhuttee |
lines.english: The True Guru has blessed me with the bounty which shall never be exhausted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਦਿਤਾ ਤੁਸਿ ਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam nidhaan ditaa tus har |
lines.english: The Lord, in His Mercy, has blessed me with the treasure of the Ambrosial Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਵਹੁ ਭੁੰਚਹੁ ਸਭਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਛੁਟਈ ॥
lines.translit: khaavahu bhunchahu sabh guramukh chhuttee |
lines.english: Eating and consuming it, all the Gurmukhs are emancipated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲੇ ਹੋਏ ਸੁਖ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: sagale hoe sukh har naam dhiaavanaa |
lines.english: All comforts are obtained, meditating on the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਜਾਏ ਭਗਤੁ ਸੁ ਥਾਨੁ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jithai jaae bhagat su thaan suhaavanaa |
lines.english: Wherever the Lord's devotee goes is a blessed, beautiful place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦਾ ਅਰਾਧਿ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਜਾਂਹਿ ਮਰਿ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: naanak sadaa araadh kade na jaanhi mar |17|
lines.english: O Nanak, worship and adore the Lord, who never dies. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨ ਮਨਿ ਆਨੰਦੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: saajan man aanand naanak naam jap |18|
lines.english: Says Nanak, O friend, chant the Naam, and your mind shall be filled with bliss. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਕਰਨਿ ਜੈਕਾਰੁ ਨਿੰਦਕ ਮੁਏ ਪਚਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeea karan jaikaar nindak mue pach |
lines.english: People praise and congratulate the devotee of the Lord, while the slanderers rot and die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਵਨ ਪਤਿਤ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਕਤਹ ਨਹੀ ਸੇਵੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: paavan patit puneet katah nahee seveeai |
lines.english: The mortal never serves the Immaculate Lord, the Purifier of sinners.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਖੁਆਰੁ ਕਹਾਂ ਲਗੁ ਖੇਵੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jhootthai rang khuaar kahaan lag kheveeai |
lines.english: The mortal wastes away in false pleasures. How long can this go on?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਤਿੰਨ ਜਿ ਦਰਗਹਿ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: harihaan hau balihaaree tin ji darageh jaaniaa |19|
lines.english: O Lord! I am a sacrifice to those who are known and approved in the Court of the Lord. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਚੰਦਉਰੀ ਪੇਖਿ ਕਾਹੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: harichandauree pekh kaahe sukh maaniaa |
lines.english: Why do you take such pleasure, looking at this mirage?

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਤਉ ਗਰਬ ਗੁਬਾਰਿ ਮਰਣੁ ਨਹ ਜਾਨਈ ॥
lines.translit: firtau garab gubaar maran neh jaanee |
lines.english: He wanders lost in the darkness of pride, and never thinks of dying.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਨੇ ਕਰਮ ਅਨੇਕ ਗਵਾਰ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਘਨ ॥
lines.translit: keene karam anek gavaar bikaar ghan |
lines.english: The fool commits countless foolish actions and so many sinful mistakes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਦ੍ਰੁਗੰਧਤ ਵਾਸੁ ਸਠ ਕਾ ਛਾਰੁ ਤਨ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa drugandhat vaas satth kaa chhaar tan |
lines.english: The fool's body smells rotten, and turns to dust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਹਰਿਚੰਦਉਰੀ ਪੇਖਿ ਕਾਹੇ ਸਚੁ ਮਾਨਈ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: harihaan harichandauree pekh kaahe sach maanee |20|
lines.english: O Lord! The mortal gazes upon the mirage; why does he think it is true? ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੀ ਪੂਜੈ ਅਉਧ ਤਿਸੈ ਕਉਣੁ ਰਾਖਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis kee poojai aaudh tisai kaun raakhee |
lines.english: When someone's days are over, who can save him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੈਦਕ ਅਨਿਕ ਉਪਾਵ ਕਹਾਂ ਲਉ ਭਾਖਈ ॥
lines.translit: baidak anik upaav kahaan lau bhaakhee |
lines.english: How long can the physicians go on, suggesting various therapies?

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਚੇਤਿ ਗਵਾਰ ਕਾਜਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਆਵਈ ॥
lines.translit: eko chet gavaar kaaj terai aavee |
lines.english: You fool, remember the One Lord; only He shall be of use to you in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਖਧੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਅਮੋਲਕੁ ਪੀਜਈ ॥
lines.translit: aaukhadh naam apaar amolak peejee |
lines.english: Drink in the medicine of the Incomparable, Priceless Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਤਨੁ ਛਾਰੁ ਬ੍ਰਿਥਾ ਸਭੁ ਜਾਵਈ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: harihaan bin naavai tan chhaar brithaa sabh jaavee |21|
lines.english: O Lord! Without the Name, the body turns to dust, and everything goes to waste. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਖਾਵਹਿ ਸੰਤ ਸਗਲ ਕਉ ਦੀਜਈ ॥
lines.translit: mil mil khaaveh sant sagal kau deejee |
lines.english: Meeting and joining together, the Saints drink it in, and give it to everyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੈ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਤਿਸੈ ਹੀ ਪਾਵਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: jisai paraapat hoe tisai hee paavane |
lines.english: He alone is blessed with it, who is destined to receive it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਤਿੰਨੑ ਜਿ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਰਾਵਣੇ ॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: harihaan hau balihaaree tina ji har rang raavane |22|
lines.english: O Lord! I am a sacrifice to those who enjoy the Love of the Lord. ||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਖਦ ਆਏ ਰਾਸਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਆਪਿ ਖਲੋਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aaukhad aae raas vich aap khaloeaa |
lines.english: The medicines are effective, when the Lord Himself stands in their midst.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੈਦਾ ਸੰਦਾ ਸੰਗੁ ਇਕਠਾ ਹੋਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: vaidaa sandaa sang ikatthaa hoeaa |
lines.english: The physicians meet together in their assembly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਓਨਾ ਕਰਮ ਸੁਕਰਮ ਹੋਇ ਪਸਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo onaa karam sukaram hoe pasariaa |
lines.english: Their good deeds and karma become apparent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਹਾਂ ਦੂਖ ਰੋਗ ਸਭਿ ਪਾਪ ਤਨ ਤੇ ਖਿਸਰਿਆ ॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: harihaan dookh rog sabh paap tan te khisariaa |23|
lines.english: O Lord! Pains, diseases and sins all vanish from their bodies. ||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਉਬੋਲੇ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: chaubole mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Chaubolas, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਵਨ ਹੁਤੇ ਸੁ ਰੰਕ ਨਹਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਿਰ ਦੀਨੇ ਕਾਟਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raavan hute su rank neh jin sir deene kaatt |1|
lines.english: then consider Raawan the king. He was not poor, but he could not buy it, even though he offered his head to Shiva. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਮਨ ਜਉ ਇਸ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਕੀ ਦਮ ਕੵਿਹੁ ਹੋਤੀ ਸਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: saman jau is prem kee dam kayihu hotee saatt |
lines.english: O Samman, if one could buy this love with money,

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਮਨੁ ਬੇਧਿਓ ਬੂਝਨੁ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸੰਜੋਗ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: charan kamal man bedhio boojhan surat sanjog |2|
lines.english: My mind is pierced through by the Lotus Feet of the Lord. He is realized when one's intuitive consciousness is attuned to Him. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਤਨੁ ਖਚਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਬੀਚੁ ਨ ਰਾਈ ਹੋਤ ॥
lines.translit: preet prem tan khach rahiaa beech na raaee hot |
lines.english: My body is drenched in love and affection for the Lord; there is no distance at all between us.
